sections.paragraph:
verb לסמן

to mark, indicate

verb סומן

be marked

verb להסתמן

be indicated, signified, apparent; to take shape

verb לסמן (>>סימן)

to mark, indicate

masculine noun

marker; cursor (comp.)

masculine noun סמן (>>סימן)

sign, mark, hallmark, clue, trace, emblem, imprint, indication, marking, note, score, seal, token, vestige, beck, index; omen, portent, foreboding; symptom; signal, indicator
